name: Famous Amos Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter until light and fluffy using an electric mixer on high speed.
2. Beat in sugars until very creamy.
3. Beat in eggs, then each remaining ingredient (except chips and pecans) until smooth.
4. Mix in chocolate pieces and chopped pecans with a spoon to create grape-sized pieces of dough.
5. Place the dough 1 inch apart on an ungreased sheet.
6. Bake at 350°F for 14 minutes or until golden brown.
